channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: BYD rolls out EV batteries with 5-minute ‘flash charging.’ But there’s a catch.
item.description: The Chinese automaker's new Blade Battery 2.0 is capable of charging at up to 1.5 megawatts, dramatically slashing the time it takes to fill up.

item.title: Italian prosecutors confirm journalist was hacked with Paragon spyware
item.description: Italian authorities are making progress in their investigation into a wide-ranging spyware scandal in Italy involving Paragon spyware. But the mystery of who hacked two Italian journalists with Paragon spyware continues.

item.title: Amazon.com is up and down, with login errors and prices not loading
item.description: If you're having issues shopping on Amazon or loading your playlists on Amazon Music, you're not alone. Downdetector is showing a sizable spike in people reporting issues with checkout, search, and logging in. The problem seems to be affecting both the site and the mobile apps. Several Verge staffers have experienced issues themselves. Clicking through […]...

item.title: It’s official: The Pentagon has labeled Anthropic a supply chain risk
item.description: The Department of Defense has officially labeled Anthropic a supply chain risk, making the AI firm the first American company with the label. Meanwhile, the DOD continues to use Anthropic's AI in Iran.

item.title: United Airlines can permanently ban passengers who don’t wear headphones
item.description: United Airlines has updated its "Contract of Carriage" to include a line that requires passengers to wear headphones while listening to audio and video content on flights, CBS News reports. Under the updated contract, United can "refuse transport on a permanent or temporary basis" to passengers who don't follow a list of rules, which now […]

item.title: Asus ProArt PX13 GoPro Edition Review: Not Just for the GoPro-Pilled
item.description: This 2-in-1 laptop bundle comes with a case, a stylus, and way too much love for GoPro.

item.title: How to watch Frost Fatales 2026, kicking off on March 8
item.description: It feels like we could all use a little (or a large) boost of joy and optimism right now, so it's a perfect coincidence that a Games Done Quick event is on the horizon. Frost Fatales 2026 is running from March 8 through March 14. This week-long livestream will be raising money for the National Women's Law Center, a nonprofit working toward gender justice for women and girls. GDQ events have been branching out with more ways to tune in for the speedrunning fun. Frost Fatales 2026 will be a streaming on the GDQ Twitch channel as usual, but the organization is also now broadcasting on YouTube, a...

item.title: Microsoft teases its next Xbox, says ‘Project Helix’ will play PC games too
item.description: The next-generation Xbox console will play both Xbox and PC games, and its codename is "Project Helix," according to Asha Sharma, who took over as Microsoft's gaming CEO last month. "Great start to the morning with Team Xbox, where we talked about our commitment to the return of Xbox including Project Helix, the code name […]

item.title: A Sequel to ‘The Wild Robot’ Is Finally Moving Ahead
item.description: Roz and Brightbill, stars of one of the best animated films in recent memory, are returning with a new director.

item.title: China’s New 5-Year Plan: More AI, Less US
item.description: Maybe it really is the dawning of the Chinese Century.

item.title: Une lune de Mars est promise à la destruction et cela pourrait arriver plus tôt que prévu !
item.description: Phobos et Deimos, les deux lunes de Mars, sont étudiées depuis presque 150 ans et elles n'ont pas livré tous leurs secrets. Les informations récentes sur la nature de certains petits astéroïdes fournies par les sondes spatiales viennent de changer ce que l'on pensait du destin final de Phobos.

item.title: The 10 Best Shows to Stream Right Now (March 2026)
item.description: Daredevil: Born Again, The Dinosaurs, and For All Mankind are just a few of the TV shows we’re springing for this month.

item.title: X revamps Creator Subscriptions with new features, like exclusive threads and shareable cards
item.description: X is rolling out a series of new features for creators, like the ability to offer paid threads and other marketing tools.

item.title: BYD says its next-gen EV battery can delivers 625 miles on a single charge and be topped up in minutes
item.description: BYD reveals details about its second-generation Blade Battery for electric vehicles, which promises more range, ultra-fast charging speeds and improved longevity

item.title: Want the digicam vibe on a budget? These are my 7 top picks for under $100
item.description: We've rounded up 7 of the best cheap point-and-shoots to cure your ‘smartphone face’ fatigue

item.title: OpenAI, in Desperate Need of a Win, Launches GPT-5.4
item.description: The latest model is supposed to be a big step forward for AI agents.

item.title: The Controversies Finally Caught Up to Kristi Noem
item.description: Donald Trump said he would replace the secretary of the Department of Homeland Security. Noem’s tenure was marked by aggressive anti-immigration tactics and ICE’s killing of two US protesters.

item.title: Dow drops 1,000 points as oil prices rise more amid war with Iran
item.description: Financial markets are again following the cue of oil prices. Stocks are falling sharply on Wall Street Thursday, including a 1,000-point slump for the Dow Jones Industrial Average, as oil prices rise further because of the war with Iran.

item.title: Taara's rival promises 10Gbps wireless internet with a seemingly cheaper plug-and-play setup, but there's a big elephant in the room
item.description: pureLiFi introduces 10Gbps LiFi for indoor networks with plug-and-play installation, but faces practical limitations caused by the inherent line-of-sight requirement.

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic is 'dressed to impress' — and this wearable that's 'full of smarts' is now $130 off at Amazon
item.description: If you're looking to upgrade to the stylish Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic, it's now reduced by $130 at Amazon, bringing it down to the best price since Black Friday.

item.title: How to watch Bayern Munich vs. Borussia Mönchengladbach online for free
item.description: How to watch Bundesliga for free. Watch Bayern Munich vs. Borussia Mönchengladbach in the Bundesliga for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: The Playdate Catalog's 3-year anniversary sale is here
item.description: If your Playdate wishlist is anything like mine (endless), here's a good excuse to actually go ahead and free some of those games from limbo: Panic is running a two-week-long sale on the Playdate Catalog to celebrate its three-year anniversary. Sure, the majority of Playdate games are pretty cheap as is, but they can still add up when you're on a wild purchasing spree. Ask me how I know! The sale will be running from March 5 until March 19 at 1PM ET (10AM PT), so take advantage of the discounts while you can. There are 423 games available in the Catalog now, according to Panic, so if you're h...

item.title: FBI Arrests Man Who Allegedly Stole $46 Million Worth of Crypto from U.S. Government Stockpile
item.description: The theft initially grabbed attention over reports that the son of an executive in charge of the crypto stash was involved.

item.title: Google reportedly muzzles Epic Games CEO Tim Sweeney until 2032
item.description: Epic Games’ courtroom battle with Google is over, but it’s reportedly going to affect how its CEO can speak about the tech giant for years for years to come. According to The Verge, part of the settlement terms Epic had signed has a clause stating that Epic and Sweeney will have to speak positively about Google’s competitiveness and app store operations going forward. “Epic believes that the Google and Android platform, with the changes in this term sheet, are procompetitive and a model for app store / platform operations, and will make good faith efforts to advocate for the same,” the clause ...

item.title: Why Fandom Discourse Feels Extra Cringe Right Now
item.description: Infighting and backlash among Heated Rivalry fans is most pronounced on X—fueled in part by censorship-driven migration from platforms like Tumblr.

item.title: Medical Journal Admits 138 of Its Case Reports Were Entirely Made Up
item.description: At least 61 of the made-up case reports were unwittingly cited in other peer-reviewed medical journals, creating hundreds more errors.

item.title: White House uses Call of Duty clips to brag about war in Iran
item.description: White House X account posts U.S. war highlight reel using images from "Call of Duty" amid real world footage.

item.title: ‘Starfleet Academy’ Draws Some Very Big Lines for Its Finale
item.description: '300th Night' wrenches 'Starfleet Academy' out of its more introspective bent to set the stage for a classically 'Trek' endgame.

item.title: Chemists Create Wacky ‘Half-Möbius’ Molecule, Quantum Computers Prove It’s the Real Deal
item.description: Chemists have created a never-before-seen type of molecule with a nearly impossible shape.

item.title: Roku is launching a trivia game called... Roklue?
item.description: Who needs Half-Life 3 or Beyond Good & Evil 2? Roku, in an attempt to gamify content discovery on its platform, has cooked up a gaming announcement for the ages. Behold: Roklue. Yes, that's a real name that someone with a job title and (likely high) salary came up with.Roklue (shudder) will quiz players on "the movies and TV shows that everyone is talking about," along with classic "beloved favorites." When it references a movie or show, it will provide a link for you to tune in on your device. The initial version is an Oscar season tie-in ("Roklue: Awards Season") that debuts on Saturday. Thi...

item.title: Hardware testing startup Nominal hits $1B valuation, raises $155M in 10 months
item.description: Nominal provides hardware testing equipment to defense tech companies. Founders Fund led the preemptive deal.

item.title: Birdbuddy’s AI-powered hummingbird feeder is matching its best price to date
item.description: Spring is peak bird-watching season, and if you want a closer look this year, Birdbuddy’s Smart Hummingbird Feeder Pro Solar has you covered. Normally $299, Birdbuddy is now selling the solar-powered feeder for $189 ($110 off), which matches its lowest price to date. Although the feeder is designed for hummingbirds, when paired with its companion […]...

item.title: Artist Uses Google Maps to Bring the Fallout: New Vegas Strip Into Real-World Vegas
item.description: He's also made a meticulous rendering of Fallout 4's Diamond City.

item.title: Apple's MacBook Neo nails the netbook by being nothing like it
item.description: Apple's new MacBook Neo is the perfect Netbook you always dreamed of, even while being nothing like it.

item.title: MacBook Neo : tout savoir sur le portable d’Apple à 699 euros en vidéo
item.description: Apple a surpris tout le monde avec son MacBook Neo, un ordinateur portable sous la barre des 700 euros qui emprunte directement ses composants à l'iPhone. Cette stratégie audacieuse cache des choix techniques particulièrement malins - mais aussi des compromis - que nous détaillons dans la vidéo présente dans cet article.

item.title: Netflix just bought an AI startup founded by Ben Affleck
item.description:
Netflix has acquired an AI filmmaking startup called InterPositive, according to a report by Variety. This is a company that was founded by actor Ben Affleck back in 2022. Don't worry if you haven't heard of it. Affleck has been operating the company in stealth mode for the past few years, so this is pretty much it's big coming-out party. The terms of the acquisition haven't been disclosed, but Affleck will remain on as a senior advisor to Netflix. Additionally, the entire staff will be absorbed into the streaming platform.
Affleck says he started the company after "observing the early rise o...

item.title: Hackers exploit OpenClaw to spread malware via GitHub - and a little help from Bing
item.description: OpenClaw's popularity is proving to be a great vessel for malware distribution, especially when it's advertised via Bing.

item.title: Mortgage refinance comeback: United Wholesale Mortgage’s refi volume jumps 387% from cycle low
item.description: Even without a full refi boom, volume is slowly rebounding—with the average 30-year fixed mortgage rate, as tracked by Freddie Mac, down to 5.98% last week. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.
